summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Argomaniz y Garcia Asesores corporate website. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend loads correctly with all 6 pages navigable, professional design implementation, and proper component integration.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu button is visible but menu does not open when clicked

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
All 6 pages (Home, Quiénes Somos, Servicios, Clientes, Blog, Contacto) load successfully
Header with logo visible on all pages
Footer visible on all pages with contact information
CTA buttons ('Contacta con Nosotros', 'Ver Servicios') functional
All images (6/6) loading correctly including logo
Phone and email links in header working
Blog page correctly shows 'Próximamente' when no articles exist
Professional design and styling implemented correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (12/13 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issue: Mobile navigation menu button is visible but menu doesn't open when clicked. This is a low priority cosmetic issue that doesn't affect core functionality.
